name: R-10 detector flags prop_type_changed when same prop name has different type
command: mkdir -p before after && printf 'export type ButtonProps = { label: string; };\n' > before/Button.tsx && printf 'export type ButtonProps = { label: number; };\n' > after/Button.tsx && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/component-api-drift.sh" --before before --after after 2>err.txt && grep -q 'kind=prop_type_changed' err.txt && grep -q 'prop=label' err.txt && echo flagged 1>&2
